title: cochlidiosperma agreste
intro: Cochlidiosperma agreste is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of China, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cochlidiosperma agreste include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe irritated mucous membranes. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
